Session.title: Session
Session.description: A racing session created by a controller.

ownerId.description: UID of the controller who created the session.

startTime.description: Timestamp (ms) when the race started. Null if not started.

Client.title: Client Registration
Client.description: A client device joined to a session.

elapsedTime.description: Elapsed time in ms after motion detection.

sessions/{sessionId}/clients/{clientId}.description: Stores the clients connected to a given session.
